title: Stale Inventory
description:
Leo correctly reported having two dandelions, then I cleared the inventory. After clearing, he still reported two dandelions.
Note that there is no log of the inventory at the time, which should be fixed.
```
[02:37:25] [chat] <TheMasonX23> leo inventory
[02:37:25] [chat] <TheMasonX23> -> QueryStatus
[02:37:26] [action] Chat OK (0ms)
[02:41:32] [chat] <TheMasonX23> Removed 2 item(s) from player Leo]
```
